title: cassine albens
intro: Cassine albens, also known as white cassine, is a shrub or small tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves, which contain anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of cassine albens include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable treatment for various skin conditions and injuries. In herbal preparations, cassine albens is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
